title: Eight years ago today 2I
wikitext:
[]: Eight years ago today... [2I] Post by Crazy Packers Fan » Sat Sep 13, 2008 3:21 am The event known as "Second Impact" occurred. I think it's time to take a moment of silence to honor the Katsuragi Expedition. I would also propose the idea that we must do whatever we can to stop there from ever being a "Third Impact." Such an event could be the end of the world as we know it. (I am kind of glad I did not know about Eva back in 2000... I seriously think I would have been on edge all day long on 9/13/2000...)

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 13, 2008 4:57 am Akira... I shall mourn your "death"...... I probably would have forgotten about today if somebody hadn't mentioned it. Hmm.

[]: Post by simon » Sat Sep 13, 2008 5:56 am Third Impact is going to happen soon, very soon. They haven't learnt anything from the past tragedy and built the Large Hadron Collider that will destroy the world within short time!!!

[]: Re: Eight years ago today... Post by pat457 » Sat Sep 13, 2008 6:41 am Crazy Packers Fan wrote: The event known as "Second Impact" occurred. I think it's time to take a moment of silence to honor the Katsuragi Expedition. I would also propose the idea that we must do whatever we can to stop there from ever being a "Third Impact." Such an event could be the end of the world as we know it. (I am kind of glad I did not know about Eva back in 2000... I seriously think I would have been on edge all day long on 9/13/2000...)

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 13, 2008 10:28 am Awww, cute. How did you do that? And, aye!

[]: Post by Shiro » Sat Sep 13, 2008 10:51 am Aye! Rest in peace, Akira-hakase. Your sacrifice was not in vain. Your discoveries helped destroy the world.

[]: Post by Zaiku » Sat Sep 13, 2008 5:04 pm Shiro wrote: Aye! Rest in peace, Akira-hakase. Your sacrifice was not in vain. Your discoveries helped destroy the world.

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Sat Sep 13, 2008 7:02 pm

[]: Post by Zaiku » Sat Sep 13, 2008 9:29 pm Its gonna be the third Impact in a few years too. How time flies.

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Sat Sep 13, 2008 11:20 pm Yeah, I'll be 27 then, oh man..........

[]: Post by Zaiku » Sat Sep 13, 2008 11:41 pm I can just imagine how the instrumentality is.

[]: Post by pat457 » Sun Sep 14, 2008 10:24 am Zaiku wrote: I can just imagine how the instrumentality is.

[]: Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sun Sep 14, 2008 12:32 pm my condolences goes out to the Katsuragi family and the other involved in the incident. Never will we forget! pat457 wrote: Erm, see you all in Instrumentality, I guess? Just don't give me any mindwanking then...

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Sep 14, 2008 12:46 pm It will certainly be a convenient way to meet all of you. No travel expenses or anything.

[]: Post by Zaiku » Sun Sep 14, 2008 4:32 pm And no AT-Fields getting in the way either.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 15, 2008 6:31 pm Wow, Third Impact on the New Year of 2016! Screw the hivemind, let's PARTAH! pat457: Aye. Akira-san... My condolences to Misato-san. And uhhh...happy birthday, Kaworu-kun. ^^

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Sep 15, 2008 8:32 pm Wow, Third Impact on the New Year of 2016! Screw the hivemind, let's PARTAH!

[]: Post by Zaiku » Tue Sep 16, 2008 1:34 am Q Yebisu or Yebichu? And I forgot to say happy bvirthday to my avatar. >_> Also, someone needs to day a cover of the song, party like its 1999, replacing 1999 with second impact.

[]: Post by pat457 » Tue Sep 16, 2008 6:09 am Q But wouldn't playing the song cause Impacts due to some disruption in the space-time continuum, because the cosmic expiration date of the song was not followed? And to remind everyone of the event... some footage of the last minutes of the Expedition .

[]: Post by Zaiku » Tue Sep 16, 2008 6:15 am The sooner the earlier, I've been really itching to get tanged. Y'know? >_>
